name: Wasp
text: Small but Mighty — Response: After Wasp (or an event you play) defeats a minion or side scheme, deal 1 damage to the villain.
real_text: Small but Mighty — Response: After Wasp (or an event you play) defeats a minion or side scheme, deal 1 damage to the villain.

linked_card.name: Nadia Van Dyne
linked_card.text: G.I.R.L. — Action: Shuffle up to 2 cards with a printed resource from your discard pile into your deck. (Limit once per round.)
linked_card.real_text: G.I.R.L. — Action: Shuffle up to 2 cards with a printed [mental] resource from your discard pile into your deck. (Limit once per round.)
linked_card.flavor: "G.I.R.L. is dedicated to finding brilliant women who will not only save the world, but change it."

name: Wasp
text:
[star] Threat you remove using your basic thwart power (THW) can be divided among schemes as you choose.
[star] Damage you deal using your basic attack power (ATK) can be divided among enemies as you choose.
real_text:
[star] Threat you remove using your basic thwart power (THW) can be divided among schemes as you choose.
[star] Damage you deal using your basic attack power (ATK) can be divided among enemies as you choose.
flavor: "Aww, you're all so tiny and cute."

name: Ant-Man
text:
While you are in [[Giant]] hero form, Ant-Man gains the [[Giant]] trait and gets +1 ATK.
While you are in [[Tiny]] hero form, Ant-Man gains the [[Tiny]] trait and gets +1 THW.
real_text:
While you are in [[Giant]] hero form, Ant-Man gains the [[Giant]] trait and gets +1 ATK.
While you are in [[Tiny]] hero form, Ant-Man gains the [[Tiny]] trait and gets +1 THW.

name: Giant Help
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 3 threat from a scheme (remove a total of 4 threat divided among schemes as you choose instead if you are in [[Giant]] hero form).
real_text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 3 threat from a scheme (remove a total of 4 threat divided among schemes as you choose instead if you are in [[Giant]] hero form).

name: Pinpoint Strike
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 7 damage to an enemy. If you are in [[Tiny]] hero form, this attack deals 1 additional damage to that enemy and gains overkill.
real_text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 7 damage to an enemy. If you are in [[Tiny]] hero form, this attack deals 1 additional damage to that enemy and gains overkill.
flavor: "You're going to want to ice that in the morning." —Wasp

name: Rapid Growth
text: Hero Interrupt: When you use one of your hero's basic powers (THW, ATK, or DEF), change to your [[Giant]] hero form and get +2 to that power for this use.
real_text: Hero Interrupt: When you use one of your hero's basic powers (THW, ATK, or DEF), change to your [[Giant]] hero form and get +2 to that power for this use.
flavor: "Bet you didn't expect to see that." —Wasp

name: Wasp Sting
text: Hero Action (attack): If you are in [[Giant]] hero form, deal a total of 4 damage divided among enemies you choose. Hero Action (attack): If you are in [[Tiny]] hero form, deal 5 damage to an enemy.
real_text: Hero Action (attack): If you are in [[Giant]] hero form, deal a total of 4 damage divided among enemies you choose. Hero Action (attack): If you are in [[Tiny]] hero form, deal 5 damage to an enemy.

name: Pym Particles
text: Hero Response: After you spend this card, heal 2 damage from your hero if you are in [[Giant]] hero form or draw 1 card if you are in [[Tiny]] hero form.
real_text: Hero Response: After you spend this card, heal 2 damage from your hero if you are in [[Giant]] hero form or draw 1 card if you are in [[Tiny]] hero form.

name: Red Room Training
text: While you are in [[Giant]] hero form, you gain retaliate 1. While you are in [[Tiny]] hero form, your basic attacks gain piercing. (Discard any tough status cards from the target before dealing damage.)
real_text: While you are in [[Giant]] hero form, you gain retaliate 1. While you are in [[Tiny]] hero form, your basic attacks gain piercing. (Discard any tough status cards from the target before dealing damage.)

name: Bio-Synthetic Wings
text: Wasp gains the [[Aerial]] trait. Interrupt: When you would take any amount of damage, if you are in [[Tiny]] hero form, exhaust Bio-Synthetic Wings → prevent 1 of that damage.
real_text: Wasp gains the [[Aerial]] trait. Interrupt: When you would take any amount of damage, if you are in [[Tiny]] hero form, exhaust Bio-Synthetic Wings → prevent 1 of that damage.

name: Wasp's Helmet
text:
While you are in [[Giant]] hero form, you get +1 THW.
While you are in [[Tiny]] hero form, you get +1 ATK.
real_text:
While you are in [[Giant]] hero form, you get +1 THW.
While you are in [[Tiny]] hero form, you get +1 ATK.

name: Thor
text: Response: After you play Thor from your hand, deal 2 damage to the villain (3 damage instead if you paid for this card using a [physical] resource).
real_text: Response: After you play Thor from your hand, deal 2 damage to the villain (3 damage instead if you paid for this card using a [physical] resource).
flavor: "You wanna eat my hammer? Then by all means, take a big bite!"

name: Wasp
text: Wasp gets +1 hit point for each pym counter on her. Interrupt: When Wasp enters play, place 1 pym counter on her (to a maximum of 3) for each [energy] resource you overpaid for Wasp's cost.
real_text: Wasp gets +1 hit point for each pym counter on her. Interrupt: When Wasp enters play, place 1 pym counter on her (to a maximum of 3) for each [energy] resource you overpaid for Wasp's cost.

name: Into the Fray
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 6 damage to a minion. For each point of excess damage dealt by this attack, remove 1 threat from the main scheme.
real_text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 6 damage to a minion. For each point of excess damage dealt by this attack, remove 1 threat from the main scheme.

name: Surprise Attack
text: Hero Response (attack): After you change form, deal 3 damage to an enemy (4 damage instead if you paid for this card using [physical] resource).
real_text: Hero Response (attack): After you change form, deal 3 damage to an enemy (4 damage instead if you paid for this card using [physical] resource).

name: The Power of Aggression
text: Max 2 per deck. Double the number of resources this card generates while paying for a Aggression (red) card.
real_text: Max 2 per deck. Double the number of resources this card generates while paying for a Aggression (red) card.

name: Boot Camp
text:
Play under any player's control. Max 1 per player.
Each ally you control gets +1 ATK.
real_text:
Play under any player's control. Max 1 per player.
Each ally you control gets +1 ATK.
flavor: "YOU CALL THAT A PUSHUP! MY GRANDMOTHER DOES BETTER PUSHUPS!"

name: Lie in Wait
text: Max 1 per player. Hero Response (attack): After a minion engages you, discard Lie in Wait → deal 3 damage to that minion.
real_text: Max 1 per player. Hero Response (attack): After a minion engages you, discard Lie in Wait → deal 3 damage to that minion.

name: Ironheart
text: Response: After you play Ironheart from your hand, draw 1 card.
real_text: Response: After you play Ironheart from your hand, draw 1 card.
flavor: "I'm totally going to be like Tony Stark! Except for that weird facial hair."

name: Spider-Man
text: Response: After you play Spider-Man from your hand, choose THW or ATK. Spider-Man gets +2 to the chosen power until the end of the phase.
real_text: Response: After you play Spider-Man from your hand, choose THW or ATK. Spider-Man gets +2 to the chosen power until the end of the phase.
flavor: "I'm needed. And just like that, none of the rest of it matters."

name: Swarm Tactics
text: Team-Up (Ant-Man and Wasp). Max 1 per deck. Hero Action: Change to your other hero form. Ready your hero.
real_text: Team-Up (Ant-Man and Wasp). Max 1 per deck. Hero Action: Change to your other hero form. Ready your hero.

real_text: Max 1 per deck.

Max 2 per deck.
Double the number of resources this card generates when paying for a Basic (gray) card.
real_text:
Max 2 per deck.

name: Quincarrier
text: Play only if your identity has the [[Avenger]] trait. Resource: Exhaust Quincarrier → generate a [wild] resource.
real_text: Play only if your identity has the [[Avenger]] trait. Resource: Exhaust Quincarrier → generate a [wild] resource.

name: Red Dreams
text: Give to the Nadia Van Dyne player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust Nadia Van Dyne → remove Red Dreams from the game. • Discard each card with a printed [mental] resource from your hand and take 1 damage. Discard this obligation.
real_text: Give to the Nadia Van Dyne player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust Nadia Van Dyne → remove Red Dreams from the game. • Discard each card with a printed [mental] resource from your hand and take 1 damage. Discard this obligation.

name: Mother's Orders
text: As an additional cost for each hero to make a basic attack, that hero must spend 1 of any resource.
real_text: As an additional cost for each hero to make a basic attack, that hero must spend 1 of any resource.
flavor: Mother has sent one of her most devious henchmen after Wasp, hoping to recapture the Red Room escapee.

name: Beetle
text: Guard. Forced Interrupt: When Beetle is defeated, choose to either spend a [physical] resource or shuffle Beetle into the encounter deck. (Wasp's nemesis minion.)
real_text: Guard. Forced Interrupt: When Beetle is defeated, choose to either spend a [physical] resource or shuffle Beetle into the encounter deck. (Wasp's nemesis minion.)

name: Beetle Armor MK IV
text:
Attach to Beetle, if able. If you cannot, attach to the villain.
Attached Character gets +4 hit points.
real_text:
Attach to Beetle, if able. If you cannot, attach to the villain.
Attached Character gets +4 hit points.
flavor: "Ugh, why can't I ever find anything around here?" —Janice Lincoln

name: Beetle Mania
text: When Revealed (Alter-Ego): This card gains surge. When Revealed (Hero): Beetle attacks you with +1 ATK. If no attack was made this way, this card gains surge.
real_text: When Revealed (Alter-Ego): This card gains surge. When Revealed (Hero): Beetle attacks you with +1 ATK. If no attack was made this way, this card gains surge.
flavor: "I was waiting for this moment to arise." —Beetle

name: Running Interference
text: Play only if your identity has the [[Avenger]] trait. Hero Action (thwart): Remove 2 threat from the main scheme. Remove X additional threat from the main scheme (to a maximum of 3), where X is equal to the villain's stage number.
real_text: Play only if your identity has the [[Avenger]] trait. Hero Action (thwart): Remove 2 threat from the main scheme. Remove X additional threat from the main scheme (to a maximum of 3), where X is equal to the villain's stage number.

name: All for One
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 3 damage to an enemy and exhaust any number of [[Avenger]] characters you control. Deal 1 additional damage to that enemy for each character exhausted this way.
real_text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 3 damage to an enemy and exhaust any number of [[Avenger]] characters you control. Deal 1 additional damage to that enemy for each character exhausted this way.

name: Perseverance
text: Hero Response: After you change form, give your hero a tough status card.
real_text: Hero Response: After you change form, give your hero a tough status card.
flavor: "You do know the front door is unlocked, right?" —Spider-Man

name: Athletic Conditioning
text: Hero Action: Discard 1 stun or confuse status card from your hero.
real_text: Hero Action: Discard 1 stun or confuse status card from your hero.
flavor: "Don't worry, the ringing in your ears will go away... eventually." —Nadia Van Dyne
